input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.7.4
            TITLE: the top-most surface of the front hoop must be no lower than the top of the steering wheel

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.7.4: The top-most surface of the Front Hoop must be no lower than the top of the steering wheel
F.5.7.4 The top-most surface of the Front Hoop must be no lower than the top of the steering wheel 
in any angular position.   See figure following F.5.9.6 below

final_answer: The top-most surface of the Front Hoop must be no lower than the top of the steering wheel in any angular position.
